login.title: Sign in to your account
login.description: Enter your credentials to access Miks.

errors.emailNotVerified: Please verify your email before logging in.
errors.lockedOut: Account temporarily locked. Try again later.
errors.networkError: Could not reach the server. Check your connection.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.description: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

register.title: Create your account
register.description: Join Miks and digitise your cooperative group

errors.emailTaken: An account with this email already exists.
errors.weakPassword: Password must be strong (uppercase, lowercase, number, symbol).
errors.cguRequired: You must accept the CGU to register.

verifyEmail.title: Check your inbox
verifyEmail.description: We sent a 6-digit code to {email}. Enter it below to verify your account.
verifyEmail.noSessionHelp: Your verification session may have expired or you came here from a direct link.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset code.
forgotPassword.sentHint: We sent a reset code to your email address. Click the link in the email or enter the code manually.
forgotPassword.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.description: Enter your email, the code we sent you, and your new password.
resetPassword.descriptionFromLink: Enter the 6-digit code from your email and your new password.
resetPassword.bannerHint: Click the link from the reset email for a smoother experience, or enter the code manually below.
resetPassword.successHelp: You can now sign in with your new password.

errors.generic: Could not reset password. Please try again.

hero.subtitle: Centralize your group's treasury. Automate contributions, secure disbursements, compute shares in real time.
hero.trustLine: Free · No credit card required · Live in 5 min

features.title: Everything you need to run a cooperative
features.subtitle: Tools designed for informal groups: easy to adopt, rigorous on security.

autoContributions.title: Automatic contributions
autoContributions.description: Set the rules once — Miks debits, allocates and computes shares. No more spreadsheet acrobatics.

vaults.title: Multiple vaults
vaults.description: Liquidity, Investment, Security. Every euro knows where it should go — and Miks makes sure it does.

doubleSignature.title: Double signature
doubleSignature.description: No money moves without two validations. By email, OTP code, or both.

realTimeShares.title: Real-time shares
realTimeShares.description: The dashboard shows each member's exact share, down to the second.

audit.title: Immutable audit
audit.description: Every action is logged, timestamped, signed. No admin can edit history.

governance.title: Shared governance
governance.description: Fine-grained roles: treasurer, chair, member, observer. Permissions per workspace.

reports.title: Automatic reports
reports.description: Monthly reports, CSV exports, projections. Everything for your year-end general assembly.

howItWorks.title: Operational in 5 minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps. Zero paperwork. Zero training.

workspace.title: Create your workspace
workspace.description: Group name, currency, contribution rules. Miks configures everything in under 60 seconds.

invite.title: Invite your members
invite.description: By link or email. Each member creates an account, verifies their identity, and receives their initial share.

operate.title: Operate in real time
operate.description: Contributions, disbursements, alerts. Everyone sees the same thing at the same moment.

1.quote: Miks replaced 3 spreadsheets and a paper notebook. We stopped arguing about shares.

2.quote: Double signature saved us from a 200K FCFA fraud attempt. The suspect could never validate.

3.quote: All 24 of my members see the same thing. No more 'how much do you owe me' loops.

finalCta.title: Ready to take control of your collective savings?
finalCta.description: Join the hundreds of cooperatives that trust Miks to secure their financial future.
finalCta.trustLine: Free · No credit card required · Setup in 5 min

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.forbidden: You don't have access to this resource.
